title: Add notification formatter service
description: Create formatNotification(type: string, data: Record<string, string>): { subject: string; body: string } in src/services/notification-formatter.ts with templates for 'enrollment', 'grade', 'reminder' notification types. Include co-located tests.
existing_patterns: src/utils/format-date.ts - formatting function pattern with typed options and switch-case for format types
src/utils/notificationHelpers.ts - existing notification formatting utilities with formatNotification function
src/services/notifications.test.ts - service test patterns using vitest with mockPayload
